subcodes.first_line: O respected handmaiden of the Kingdom! Your letter was received and its contents were endearing. Regarding the connections between France and Scotland [3.5s]... ...The question of drinking liquors (temperance) is (also) forbidden in the Tablets of Baha'u'llah.... As regards the women's movement… As regards the second trip of ‘Abdu'l-Baha to America…
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محترمه ملکوتی نامه شما رسید معانی دلنشین بود از روابط فرانسه و اسکاتلند
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @unity; oneness of humanity, @growth of the Cause
